entity.label: Jaakobah

entity.description: Heel-catcher, a form of the name Jacob, one of the descendants of Simeon (1 Chr. 4:36).

verses.text: And Elioenai, and Jaakobah, and Jeshohaiah, and Asaiah, and Adiel, and Jesimiel, and Benaiah,
